rounds: Lavendra with the necklace, black bag, and Noskin loafers — his people, no armour, full picture. That one was yours. Purple Country Road bag to the food shop, self-talk caught mid-air and overruled — that one was yours too. But the Apollo ring and necklace are still sitting on the bench at work, and the poncho is still doing a lot of heavy lifting at Balmoral. Those rounds went to the joy police.
pattern: They're loudest when his people might clock him — quieter with strangers, noisier the closer the audience gets to actually knowing him.
